issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as timeouts or rate limiting.

scenarios.name: Directory and file discovery with backup extensions
scenarios.rationale: Both use dir mode with proper wordlist and backup extensions; treatment adds richer extension list, 401/403 reasoning, and output saving.

scenarios.name: Subdomain enumeration plus virtual host discovery
scenarios.rationale: Both cover dns and vhost modes correctly; treatment includes --append-domain, --show-ips, and clearer mechanism explanation.
